profile.title: Profile
profile.completeProfileDescription: Please enter your name to continue using the app
profile.nameRequirement: At least first name or last name must contain at least 1 character
profile.nameValidationError: At least one name must have at least 1 character
profile.invalidName: Name must contain at least 3 alphabetical letters

sports.title: Sports
sports.primarySportToast: This is your main sport. It is used as the default when creating games and in your profile.
sports.otherSportsDescription: Levels and estimates are per sport. Star marks your main sport for games and profile.
sports.removeSportConfirmMessage: Remove {{sport}} from your profile? You can add it again later.
sports.cannotRemoveAfterGames: You cannot remove a sport after you have rated games in it.

profile.telegramSyncFailed: Could not update from Telegram. Open a chat with the bot first.
profile.appleOnlyIOS: Apple Sign In is only available on iOS devices
profile.unlinkAppleConfirmation: Are you sure you want to unlink your Apple account? You will no longer be able to sign in with Apple.
profile.unlinkGoogleConfirmation: Are you sure you want to unlink your Google account? You will no longer be able to sign in with Google.
profile.oauthMergeMessageGoogle: This Google account already has a separate profile. Combine it with your current account? Games, chats, and wallet from the other profile will move here. The other profile will be removed.
profile.oauthMergeMessageApple: This Apple account already has a separate profile. Combine it with your current account? Games, chats, and wallet from the other profile will move here. The other profile will be removed.
profile.sendMessagesDescription: Get notified when someone sends a message in your game chats or bug reports
profile.sendInvitesDescription: Get notified when someone invites you to a game
profile.sendDirectMessagesDescription: Get notified when someone sends you a direct message
profile.sendRemindersDescription: Get notified 2 hours before your games, tournaments, or training bars start
profile.marketplaceNotificationsDescription: Get notified when new items are listed in your city
profile.teamNotificationsDescription: Invites, accept/decline, removals, and team updates
profile.notificationStillOnInChannel: Still on in {{channel}} — tap to switch
profile.allowMessagesFromNonContactsDescription: Let anyone in your city send you direct messages. Turn off to receive messages only from contacts.
profile.showOnlineStatusHint: Others won't see your online status; you also won't see other users' online statuses.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: When are you available to play? By default you are available 24/7.

periodBoundaries.title: When each period starts
periodBoundaries.subtitle: Period view and morning/afternoon/evening presets use these hour ranges.

presets.hintFullWeek: Tap a shortcut to narrow from 24/7. Your first choice replaces the full week.
presets.hintToggle: Tap to add. Tap again when highlighted to remove.

profile.preferNotToSayAcknowledgment: I acknowledge that I will not participate in mix tournaments, gender leagues and other gender related events.
profile.invalidImageType: Please select a valid image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP)
profile.imageTooLarge: Image file is too large. Maximum size is 10MB
profile.dragDropOrClick: Drag & drop or click to upload
profile.imageRequirements: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP up to 10MB
profile.cropInstructions: Drag to move, scroll to zoom, rotate as needed
profile.deleteUserMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteUserSecondMessage: This is your last chance. Are you absolutely certain you want to permanently delete your account? All your data will be lost forever.
profile.noGamesAgainstEachOther: No games where both players participated
profile.sessionsSubtitle: Manage where you stay logged in
profile.sessionsSignOutAllConfirm: You will be logged out on every device. You will need to sign in again on each device you use.
profile.shareGamePhotosToFollowers: Share game photos in followers' stories
profile.shareGamePhotosToFollowersDescription: When you upload photos to finished public games, followers may see them in stories
profile.shareGameCreationsToFollowersDescription: Public games you announce appear in followers' stories
profile.shareGameResultsToFollowersDescription: Your final game results may appear in followers' stories
